commands.review_summary:
The PR changes memory-wiki local-source re-ingest to read an existing generated source page, preserve its human Notes block, and adds focused ingest regressions.

PR surface: Source +35, Tests +82. Total +117 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main and v2026.6.9 write a regenerated source page with an empty Notes block, and the PR body includes before/after on-disk proof for the actual ingestMemoryWikiSource path; I did not run repository tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow mechanical PR-branch repair can address the remaining Notes-block boundary bug without product judgment.

target.title: fix(memory-wiki): preserve human notes block on source re-ingest
target.author: yetval
